title: Aircraft Technician
description:
BOMBARDIER

Bombardier is a global leader, creating innovative and game-changing planes. Our products and services provide world-class transportation experiences that set new standards in passenger comfort, energy, efficiency, reliability and safety. We are a global organization focused on working together with a team spirit.


Position Summary

Responsible for troubleshooting, inspecting and performing maintenance on customer aircrafts including engine, avionics and aircraft components. Ensuring that work performed is in full compliance with approved and applicable technical data (procedures) without shortcuts.


In this role, you will:

  • Responsible for the broad range of maintenance tasks.
  • Troubleshoot problems, make repairs, and complete inspections.
  • Ensure smooth maintenance processes with strict adherence to schedules & targets.
  • Verify the aircraft conformity and the state of its engine or cockpit pieces.
  • Maintain the aircraft, repair reported defects and ensure plane serviceability.
  • Supervise and/or coordinate with other technicians and assist with training.


Qualification


As our ideal candidate:

  • You must have aviation / trade specific training or equivalent qualification; aviation / trade specific training or equivalent qualification;
  • You are able to read mechanical engineering drawings;
  • You have minimum 7 years in aircraft experience on mechanical or avionics
  • You are attentive and able to coordinate closely with other departments to ensure a continuous smooth progress and completion of the projects.


Bombardier is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, age, disability status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by Federal, National, or Local Laws.

We thank all applicants for their interest, however, only those under consideration will be contacted. Please continue to monitor our website and apply for additional positions for which you are qualified and may be of interest to you.


Join us at https://jobs.bombardier.com

Your ideas move people.

postedCompany.description: Bombardier is a global leader in aviation, focused on designing, manufacturing and servicing the world's most exceptional business jets and specialized mission platforms. Bombardier has been successful in setting the highest standards because we are a people-centric business that fosters passion, diversity and authenticity.
postedCompany.name: BOMBARDIER AEROSPACE SERVICES SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
